case_title: UNIFUND CORPORATION vs. RODRIGUEZ, ALFREDO et al

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-18-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 9/18/96: FOR FILING AND PERFECTING DEFAULT JUDGMENT. IF NO DEFAULT JUDGMENT COURT WILL IMPOSE SANCTIONS. HEARING SET FOR OCT-18-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-18-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE SANCTION OF $150.00 ON PLFF & PLFF'S CSL PAYABLE 11/10/96 AS TO THE 1ST ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE; AS TO THE 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DIRECTED TO PLFF'S CSL OF RECORD: AS TO WHY NO DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED, AND CCP 575.2, FOR COUNSELS'S FAILURE TO CONPLY WITH RULES; IF NO DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED, COURT WILL DISMISS THE CASE. HEARING SET FOR NOV-18-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
